macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Nifty Index Suffers Major Correction Amid Wave C Downtrend
items.summary: India's Nifty index dropped sharply to around 23,151 on Friday, with analysts projecting further downside to 22,700-22,750 or even 21,445 in a Wave C structure. March 18 is flagged as a crucial date for potential bottom or reversal.

items.title: US Bombs Iran's Kharg Island Amid Escalating Middle East Conflict
items.summary: The US conducted strikes on Iran's Kharg Island, a key oil export facility, intensifying geopolitical tensions. This follows ongoing Iran-US-Israel conflict, with impacts on oil prices and global markets.

items.title: MOVE Index Spike Signals Deeper Equity Correction and War Duration
items.summary: The MOVE Index has spiked in the last four days, implying potential deeper equity market corrections similar to April 2025. Nifty has drawn down over 2,000 points since war start, raising questions on reducing equity exposure.

items.title: Inflation Risks Rise, Fed Rate Cut Expectations Halved in 48 Hours
items.summary: Markets now price only one Fed rate cut in 2026 after pricing two, due to surging oil prices crossing $100/barrel and bond sell-off. Growth stocks face valuation compression amid higher discount rates.

items.title: Geopolitical Tensions Drive Dollar Strength and US30 Volatility
items.summary: Dollar Index rises on war-driven capital flows; Dow Jones (US30) reacts to tensions with potential downside. Crude oil surges due to Middle East conflicts, impacting energy markets.

items.title: Iran Mocks US Over Russian Oil Sanctions Waiver Amid Conflict
items.summary: Iran's Abbas Araghchi criticized the White House for granting India a waiver on Russian oil sanctions. Iran also issued peace demands to Trump and Netanyahu, threatening continued fight.

items.title: S&P Dow Jones Considers Fast-Tracking SpaceX into S&P 500
items.summary: Bloomberg reports potential rule changes to include SpaceX in the S&P 500, affecting $24 trillion in indexed assets, bypassing traditional price discovery requirements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Hovers Near $71,000 Ahead of Federal Reserve Decision
items.summary: Bitcoin is trading around $71,000 as investors monitor macroeconomic signals and liquidity ahead of the Fed's March 18 interest rate announcement. The cryptocurrency has declined 47% over the past year while gold has surged 77%, though JPMorgan analysts now view Bitcoin as more attractive long-term.

items.title: SEC Explores Tokenized Equity Framework for Blockchain-Based Stock Trading
items.summary: U.S. regulators are evaluating frameworks for blockchain-based equities, with SEC leaders signaling potential pilot programs and exemptions that could enable tokenized stock trading while addressing settlement rules and investor protections.

items.title: Pepeto Announces Cross-Chain Bridge Update Across Multiple Blockchains
items.summary: Pepeto's team announced a major update to its cross-chain bridge infrastructure, expanding zero-cost token routing across Ethereum, BNB Chain, and Solana.

items.title: Chainlink Trades Near $9 as Real World Asset Adoption Expands
items.summary: Chainlink is trading near $9 as its oracle infrastructure supports growing institutional tokenization efforts. Partnerships with traditional finance firms have expanded through early 2026, though LINK's price remains tied to the broader altcoin cycle.

items.title: Sui Maintains $1 Price Point Amid Layer 1 Competition
items.summary: Sui is trading at $1 with its DeFi ecosystem continuing to attract developers. Analysts project SUI could exceed $1.10 if Bitcoin sustains recovery, though the token remains volatile and dependent on capital rotation toward Layer 1 alternatives.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
